title: miliusa fragrans
intro: Miliusa fragrans, also known as the Himalayan Miliusa or Himalayan Fragrant Miliusa, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Annonaceae. It is native to the Himalayan region and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antifungal and antibacterial properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Miliusa fragrans include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
